channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: The Suns' Big 3 is still together after the trade deadline, so the search for success continues
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Kevin Durant, Devin Booker and Bradley Beal are still members of the Phoenix Suns after a tumultuous trade deadline. Now they have roughly 30 games to turn around their disappointing season. The problem is there aren't many reasons to believe that's going to happen.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: RJ Luis and Kadary Richmond rally No. 12 St. John's to 68-62 victory over No. 19 UConn
item.description: RJ Luis Jr. scored six of his 21 points in the final 2:16 to help No. 12 St. John’s extend its winning streak to 10 games with a 68-62 victory over No. 19 UConn.
item.dc:creator: Jim Fuller, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: NASCAR honors 'The Ironman' Ricky Rudd and 'Cousin Carl' Edwards as Hall of Fame inductees
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — One of the toughest drivers in NASCAR history joined one the most enigmatic drivers of the modern era as the newest inductees into the Hall of Fame in a star-studded Friday night ceremony.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Super Bowl LIX: Chiefs, Eagles players with ties to San Diego area
item.description: Super Bowl Sunday is sure to be a fun one as the Philadelphia Eagles and Kansas City Chiefs battle it out for the Vince Lombardi Trophy.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Ben Simmons no longer with the Nets as the sides work toward a buyout
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Ben Simmons' time with the Brooklyn Nets appears to be over. The No. 1 pick in the 2016 draft was not with the Nets for their game Friday night against the Miami Heat as the sides work toward a buyout of his contract.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Walz's home state joins California in ignoring Trump's executive order to ban transgenders from girls sports
item.description: Minnesota's governing body for high school sports says it will continue to allow transgender athletes to compete in prep athletics despite President Trump's executive order.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mavericks GM getting boost in security for first home game since Luka Dončić trade after death threats: report
item.description: Dallas Mavericks general manager Nico Harrison will reportedly have heightened security for the team's first home game after trading Luka Dončić and receiving death threats.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pawnbrokers raided in connection with Joe Burrow burglary denied bail days before the Super Bowl
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Two owners of a New York City pawnshop that was raided by the FBI in connection with an investigation into a burglary at the home of Cincinnati Bengals quarterback Joe Burrow were denied bail Friday, with a federal judge saying it would be “ironic” to release the men just two days
item.dc:creator: PHILIP MARCELO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hall of Fame voter says Eli Manning discussion was one of 'most contentious' ever among committee
item.description: Eli Manning will have to wait at least one more year to get into the Pro Football Hall of Fame after what was a "contentious" discussion to leave him out.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: UMass will pay student who made half-court $10,000 after insurance company said his foot was on line
item.description: A UMass student who made a half-court shot during a women’s basketball game halftime promotion will get his $10,000 prize from the school itself after the insurance company refused to pay because, it said, his foot was on the line.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Public visitation scheduled for Virginia Halas McCaskey
item.description: The public will have an opportunity to pay their respects and say goodbye to Virginia Halas McCaskey, the longtime owner and matriarch of the Chicago Bears, who passed away Thursday at the age of 102.
item.dc:creator: BJ Lutz, WGN 9

item.title: Capitals are one of just 2 NHL teams without a player in the 4 Nations Face-Off. It could help them
item.description: ARLINGTON, Va. (AP) — Cruising to the top of the NHL standings by winning 36 of their first 54 games and losing just 11 in regulation, the Washington Capitals solidified themselves as a team to watch this spring. For much of the next two weeks, they'll be watching everyone else.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fairfield's Deon Perry nails incredible 70-foot game-winning shot to beat rival Marist
item.description: Fairfield Stags' guard Deon Perry nailed a 70-foot game winning shot to beat Marist 59-56 on Thursday night at Fairfield University's Leo D. Mahoney Arena.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Live: Breaking down the matchups headed into Super Bowl weekend
item.description: The Chiefs and Eagles will kickoff Super Bowl LIX in two days from the Caesars Superdome in New Orleans, both with hopes of being crowned the kings of the NFL.
item.dc:creator: Juan Cisneros, NewsNation

item.title: Jason Kelce and look-alike posse take on New Orleans
item.description: Five of the most passionate NFL fan duos in America were challenged to be the first team to find the real Jason Kelce.
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: Virginia Halas McCaskey, longtime Bears owner and matriarch, dies at 102
item.description: McCaskey had been the owner of the Bears since her father and team founder George S. Halas died on Oct. 31, 1983.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: Several student-athletes lock in colleges on first NSD of 2025
item.description: Sean Lewis made it clear he wanted to put a fence around San Diego in the recruiting world. He proved it in the high school realm by bringing in 2024 Iron Hog winner Jett Thomas of La Jolla.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5

item.title: Settlement creates $5 million fund for NWSL players after abuse scandal
item.description: The National Women's Soccer League will establish a $5 million fund for players as part of a settlement that stemmed from allegations of emotional and sexual misconduct that rocked the league in 2021. Attorneys general from Washington, D.C.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: President Donald Trump to attend Super Bowl LIX
item.description: Many A-list stars are often seen at large sporting events, dawning their favorite team's gear and posting the experiences on social media. But hardly any can compare to the magnitude of the Super Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Olivia Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: The 2025 Super Bowl commercials already catching attention
item.description: Super Bowl Sunday isn't here yet, but some of the commercials set to air during the game have already been released.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, NewsNation

item.title: Fans at Raptors game continue trend of booing US national anthem at pro sporting events in Canada
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Fans at a Toronto Raptors game continued an emerging trend Sunday of booing the American national anthem at pro sporting events in Canada.
item.dc:creator: IAN HARRISON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah loses fifth straight in another close game
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club has been in nearly every game the last couple weeks, but have not been able to close teams out. Jordan Kyrou broke a tie in the third period to help the St.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Veteran invites Navy friends to run Carlsbad Marathon
item.description: When most old buddies reconnect they grab a bite to eat. Ryan Le and his friends, however, they go for a run.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Drew Brees serves up pickleball to beloved New Orleans
item.description: NEW ORLEANS - Drew Brees had his fair share of fun in New Orleans, taking the Saints to football heaven. Now. the future Hall of Famers found a second line of work, quarterbacking one of the fastest growing sports in America. "Look. I'm a sports junkie, right? I love ping pong. I love tennis.
item.dc:creator: Rick Tarsitano, WGN 9

item.title: South Carolina retires jersey number of three-time WNBA MVP A’ja Wilson
item.description: Three-time WNBA MVP A’ja Wilson's South Carolina No. 22 jersey was hung in the rafters Sunday at Colonial Life Arena, her college home court that already features a statue of the program’s all-time leading scorer outside the main entrance.
item.dc:creator: PETE IACOBELLI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NBA shocker: Luka Doncic to the Lakers, Anthony Davis to the Mavs in blockbuster trade, AP source says
item.description: Luka Doncic led Dallas to the NBA Finals last season. Anthony Davis won a championship with the Los Angeles Lakers. They're switching teams now — in an absolute blockbuster.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Reinhart scores 30th, Maurice wins 900th as Panthers top Blackhawks after Slaggert's 7-second goal
item.description: Sam Reinhart got his 30th goal of the season and added two assists, Matthew Tkachuk scored for the third time in the last four games and the Florida Panthers beat the Chicago Blackhawks 5-1 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Meet the puppies representing San Diego in 2025 Puppy Bowl
item.description: Just ahead of the Super Bowl LIX matchup between the Kansas City Chiefs and the Philadelphia Eagles, the Puppy Bowl XXI kicks off Super Bowl Sunday with a morning competition between hundreds of rescue puppies.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Straka has late surge to regain Pebble Beach lead over Rory McIlroy and Shane Lowry
item.description: Sepp Straka watched his shot on the 10th sail over the cliff and onto the beach, starting a stretch of three straight bogeys. He rallied with four birdies over the final five holes to salvage a 2-under 70 and a one-shot lead over McIlroy and Shane Lowry.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5
